jtwc.title: Tropical Storm 05E (Elida) Warning #17
jtwc.text:
WTPN31 PHNC 182200
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/TROPICAL STORM 05E (ELIDA) WARNING NR 017//
RMKS/
1. TROPICAL STORM 05E (ELIDA) WARNING NR 017    
   01 ACTIVE TROPICAL CYCLONE IN EASTPAC

   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY
